languages.text: {n}Манипулус с трудом фокусирует на вас мутный взгляд.{/n} "Сколь причудлива жизнь, Вольный Торговец. Я превратился из экспериментатора в подопытного... Мой досточтимый коллега придал мне этот неполноценный облик, чтобы пересаживать меня в заготовленные им образцы. Он пытается доказать, что его навыки генетики и аугментации превосходят мои. Пока что он доказал лишь свою мелочность и несостоятельность".

{n}The Manipulus struggles to focus his clouded gaze on you.{/n} "How peculiar life is, Rogue Trader. I have gone from experimenter to test subject... My esteemed colleague has given me this imperfect form in order to transplant me into his prepared specimens. He seeks to prove that his skills in genetics and augmentation surpass mine. So far, he has proven only his pettiness and inadequacy."
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус с трудом фокусирует на вас мутный взгляд.{/n} "Сколь причудлива жизнь, Вольный Торговец. Я превратился из экспериментатора в подопытного... Пока что он доказал лишь свою мелочность и несостоятельность".

languages.text: {n}Dem Manipulus fällt es schwer, seinen getrübten Blick auf dich zu richten.{/n} "Das Leben ist schon seltsam, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich wurde vom Experimentator zum Testsubjekt ... Mein geschätzter Kollege gab mir diese imperfekte Form, um mich in seine vorbereiteten Versuchsstücke zu transplantieren. Er will beweisen, dass seine genetischen und augmentatorischen Fähigkeiten die meinen übersteigen. Bis jetzt hat er allerdings lediglich seine Unzulänglichkeit bewiesen."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus struggles to focus his clouded gaze on you.{/n} "How peculiar life is, Rogue Trader. I have gone from experimenter to test subject... My esteemed colleague has given me this imperfect form in order to transplant me into his prepared specimens. He seeks to prove that his skills in genetics and augmentation surpass mine. So far, he has proven only his pettiness and inadequacy."

Ich wurde vom Experimentator zum Testsubjekt ... Mein geschätzter Kollege gab mir diese imperfekte Form, um mich in seine vorbereiteten Versuchsstücke zu transplantieren. Er will beweisen, dass seine genetischen und augmentatorischen Fähigkeiten die meinen übersteigen. Bis jetzt hat er allerdings lediglich seine Unzulänglichkeit bewiesen."

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus lutte pour parvenir à fixer son regard embrumé sur vous.{/n} « La vie est pleine de surprises, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Moi, l'expérimentateur... je suis devenu un cobaye. Mon estimé collègue m'a donné cette forme imparfaite afin de pouvoir me transplanter sur un spécimen préparé par ses soins. Il cherche à prouver que ses talents en matière de génétique et d'augmentation surpassent les miens. Pour l'instant, il n'a guère prouvé que son incompétence et sa mesquinerie. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus struggles to focus his clouded gaze on you.{/n} "How peculiar life is, Rogue Trader. I have gone from experimenter to test subject... My esteemed colleague has given me this imperfect form in order to transplant me into his prepared specimens. He seeks to prove that his skills in genetics and augmentation surpass mine. So far, he has proven only his pettiness and inadequacy."

Il cherche à prouver que ses talents en matière de génétique et d'augmentation surpassent les miens. Pour l'instant, il n'a guère prouvé que son incompétence et sa mesquinerie. »

languages.text: {n}El manipulus se esfuerza por dirigir su nublada mirada hacia ti.{/n} «La vida le depara a uno situaciones peculiares, Comerciante Independiente. He pasado de experimentador a sujeto de pruebas... Mi estimado colega me ha dado esta forma imperfecta para trasplantarme a especímenes preparados. Busca demostrar que sus habilidades de genética y aumentos superan las mías. De momento, solo ha demostrado ser inepto y mezquino».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus struggles to focus his clouded gaze on you.{/n} "How peculiar life is, Rogue Trader. I have gone from experimenter to test subject... My esteemed colleague has given me this imperfect form in order to transplant me into his prepared specimens. He seeks to prove that his skills in genetics and augmentation surpass mine. So far, he has proven only his pettiness and inadequacy."

Busca demostrar que sus habilidades de genética y aumentos superan las mías. De momento, solo ha demostrado ser inepto y mezquino».

languages.text: {n}Manipülus, bulanık bakışlarını sana odaklamakta zorlanıyor.{/n} "Hayat ne kadar tuhaf Hür Tacir. Deneyciyken denek oldum... Saygıdeğer meslektaşım, beni hazırladığı numunelere nakletmek için bana bu kusurlu formu verdi. Genetik ve ogmentasyon konusundaki becerilerinin benimkileri aştığını kanıtlamaya çalışıyor. Şimdiye kadar sadece küçüklüğünü ve yetersizliğini kanıtladı."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus struggles to focus his clouded gaze on you.{/n} "How peculiar life is, Rogue Trader. I have gone from experimenter to test subject... So far, he has proven only his pettiness and inadequacy."

Şimdiye kadar sadece küçüklüğünü ve yetersizliğini kanıtladı."

languages.text: {n}操纵者费劲地将他浑浊的视线聚焦在你身上。{/n}“人生真是奇妙，行商浪人。我从实验者沦为了受试者……我那位尊敬的同僚，将我改造成如今这副残缺之躯，好将我移植到他准备好的样本上。他试图证明自己在基因与植入物方面的造诣远胜过我。可迄今为止，他只证明了自己的狭隘与无能。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus struggles to focus his clouded gaze on you.{/n} "How peculiar life is, Rogue Trader. I have gone from experimenter to test subject... My esteemed colleague has given me this imperfect form in order to transplant me into his prepared specimens. He seeks to prove that his skills in genetics and augmentation surpass mine. So far, he has proven only his pettiness and inadequacy."

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスは、濁った視線をあなたに合わせようと苦心する。{/n}「生とは実に奇妙なものですね、ローグトレーダー。私は実験者から被験体へと成り果てました……我が尊敬すべき同僚は、私を彼の用意した標本へ移植せんがために、この不完全な形態を私に与えたのです。彼は、遺伝学と増強における自らの技量が私を凌ぐことを証明しようとしている。今のところ彼が証明したのは、自らの卑小さと無能さだけですが」

So far, he has proven only his pettiness and inadequacy."
